name: outloud
description: OutLoud — voice for your AI. /speak (or /speaker:speak) for control. Run /speaker:setup after install for guided validation + one-time setup (WSL/Linux/mac friendly). Auto-capture + auto-narration. edge-tts default. Zero tokens.

plugins.name: speaker
plugins.description: Main speaker control + /speaker:setup (forces validation + prints exact setup commands or 'completed'). /speak last|on|"text". Self-guiding for WSL/Linux/mac.
